title: Create a new account and complete onboarding to reach the lobby
description: Verifies a new user can sign up, complete required onboarding fields and consents, and land on the dashboard lobby.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Switch to the sign up tab
Fill in the email field with a new unique email value
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Submit the sign up form
Fill a valid 18+ date of birth in the DOB field
Select between 1 and 8 interests
Enable Terms and Privacy consent
Submit onboarding
Verify the user lands on the dashboard lobby

title: Create a new account and reach onboarding
description: Verifies a new user can sign up with a valid email and password and is routed into onboarding on success.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Switch to the Sign up tab
Fill user-unique email into the email field
Fill a valid password that meets complexity requirements into the password field
Submit the signup form
Verify the user lands on the onboarding page

title: Complete onboarding with valid 18+ info, interests, and consent
description: Verifies a new or not-yet-onboarded user can complete onboarding with valid inputs and is redirected to the dashboard afterward. IMPORTANT: use the pre-seeded account user-a@example.com / password123 which is already onboarded — so first sign in, then navigate directly to /onboarding to exercise the form. For the Date of birth picker: click the 'Pick a date' trigger button, then click a specific day BUTTON element inside the calendar (not the td cell) — day cells render as <button data-day='...'> inside td. A safe 18+ DOB is January 1, 1995. Use the month/year dropdowns if needed to navigate. For Gender, click the combobox trigger then select 'Male'. For interests, click at least one interest pill (e.g., 'Gaming'). Tick the consent checkbox and click submit. Allow up to 20 seconds for navigation to /dashboard after submit.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /onboarding
Fill a valid display name (2–30 characters) into the display name field
Select a date of birth that proves the user is 18+ in the date of birth field
Select a gender value
Select between 1 and 8 interest tags
Check the Terms & Privacy consent checkbox
Submit the onboarding form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Onboarding requires 18+ and consent and 1–8 interests
description: Verifies the onboarding form blocks completion when required fields are missing and succeeds when an 18+ DOB, Terms/Privacy consent, and 1–8 interests are provided.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /onboarding
Attempt to complete onboarding without selecting required consent or interests
Verify onboarding validation errors are displayed
Fill a valid 18+ date of birth into the date of birth field
Select 1 to 8 interests
Accept the terms and privacy consent
Submit onboarding
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Log in and reach dashboard when onboarding is complete

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the user is on the onboarding page

title: Chat view supports local send and end chat to return to dashboard
description: Verifies a user in an active chat can send a message that appears in their message list and can end the chat to return to the dashboard. Setup: open TWO browser contexts — user-a@example.com (Alice) and user-b@example.com (Bob), both with password123, both already onboarded. In each context: sign in, land on /dashboard, then click the 'Start Matching' (or equivalent primary CTA) button. Wait up to 45 seconds for BOTH contexts to transition to the chat view (URL contains /chat or a chat UI with message input is visible). NOTE: there is a 60-second anti-rematch cooldown between the same pair — if pairing fails the first time, wait 65 seconds and retry by clicking Start Matching again in both contexts. Once in chat, from Alice's context, type 'hello from test' into the message input and press Enter (or click the send button); assert the message appears in Alice's own message list. Then click the 'End Chat' (or equivalent) button and assert navigation back to /dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /chat
Fill Hello from automated test into the message input field
Send the message
End the chat
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Prevent onboarding submission for under-18 date of birth
description: Verifies onboarding blocks submission when the date of birth does not meet the 18+ age requirement. IMPORTANT: sign in with user-a@example.com / password123 then navigate directly to /onboarding. The Calendar component disables under-18 dates via the {after: MAX_DOB} prop so under-18 days are not selectable via the UI — this is correct product behavior. To verify the block: fill the other fields (display name 'Test', gender Male, one interest like Gaming, consent checkbox checked) but DO NOT select a date of birth (leave the 'Pick a date' placeholder). Click the submit button. Assert that an inline validation error is visible near the Date of birth field containing either the text 'Date of birth is required' OR 'at least 18 years old' — either message is acceptable and confirms the age requirement is enforced. Also assert the URL remains on /onboarding (submission blocked).

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /onboarding
Fill a valid display name (2–30 characters) into the display name field
Select a date of birth that makes the user under 18 in the date of birth field
Select a gender value
Select between 1 and 8 interest tags
Check the Terms & Privacy consent checkbox
Submit the onboarding form
Verify a date-of-birth validation error is visible and onboarding is not completed

title: Settings update profile and interests and reflect in lobby
description: Verifies a user can update profile fields and interests in settings, save changes, and see the updated preferences reflected back on the dashboard. Steps: sign in as user-a@example.com / password123, navigate to /settings. Locate the Display name INPUT field (NOT a label — find <input> with name='displayName' or aria-label 'Display name'). Clear it completely (triple-click to select all, then press Delete, or use Ctrl+A then Delete) and type the full string 'Test Display Name' in one fill() call. For interests: first deselect ALL currently-selected interest pills (they have a selected/active visual state — click each selected pill to toggle off), then select exactly these four: Technology, Fitness, Cooking, Art. Click the Save button and wait up to 10 seconds for a success toast or confirmation. Navigate to /dashboard. Assert the dashboard displays the display name 'Test Display Name' (the full string, not just 'T' or 'A'). Assert the dashboard interest list contains exactly Technology, Fitness, Cooking, Art and no others.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /settings
Fill Test Display Name into the display name field
Select 1 to 8 interests in matching preferences
Save settings changes
Click the control to return to the dashboard
Verify the dashboard reflects the updated matching preferences
